_comment: Place the file you choose at the project root (next to Packages/ and Assets/).
Agents read this file to resolve YJackCore paths without guessing layout.
keys, and any unused layout block before committing.
Required fields: layout, packageName, version, unityVersion
Optional fields: packagePath, sourcePath, upmUrl, agentsPath, modules, notes
upm       — installed via Unity Package Manager using a git URL or registry
sibling   — YJackCore repository checked out as a sibling folder (../YJackCore)
submodule — YJackCore added as a git submodule inside the project
vendor    — YJackCore source copied into a local Packages/ subdirectory
inline    — YJackCore embedded directly inside Assets/ (legacy, not recommended)

upm._comment: Package installed through Unity Package Manager via a git URL.
upm.notes: UPM layout. No local source available. Use yjackcore-support.md as authority fallback.

sibling._comment: YJackCore repository cloned as a sibling folder next to this project.
sibling.notes: Sibling checkout. Agents should read ../YJackCore/AGENTS.md as highest authority.

submodule._comment: YJackCore added as a git submodule at Packages/com.ygamedev.yjack.
submodule.notes: Submodule layout. Agents should read Packages/com.ygamedev.yjack/AGENTS.md first.

vendor.notes: Vendor layout. Package is editable locally. Changes require explicit owner approval.

inline._comment: YJackCore embedded inside Assets/ (legacy, not recommended for new projects).
inline.notes: Inline / legacy layout. Assets/ embedding bypasses UPM isolation. Migrate to Packages/ when possible.
